The base beneficiary summary file is also known as the MBSF Part A, B, C, and D segment.28 

Although there is a small amount of beneficiary demographic information on the detailed MOFs, in general the CCW 
team recommends that researchers use the MBSF to obtain these data. CMS creates the MOFs at a different point in 
time, during which actual values (e.g., age or disability status) may have changed, and in rare instances, the model 
uses different decision
